summary: Exceptional audience recording from Shakedown Street captured with crystal‑clear sound despite being 275 ft away, reflecting a superb Dead performance.
review: Both reviewers give the tape five stars, highlighting how the distant (≈275 ft) placement still yields excellent clarity thanks to the quality of the venue mics and the Dead’s PA system. The recording appears to be an audience capture that manages to convey the energy of the show without noticeable loss in detail.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings and enthusiastic comments indicate both a great performance and an excellent audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captured from ~275 ft away; reviewers praise mic placement and PA, noting clear, crisp sound with no apparent muddiness despite distance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Specific song or set details were not mentioned; however the overall impression is of a strong, energetic performance.
